headline: Jim Cramer Says “Qnity Has Become One of My Favorite New Stocks”
summary: Qnity Electronics, Inc. (NYSE:Q) is one of the S&P 500 stocks that Jim Cramer shared his take on. Cramer believes that being spun off was good for the company, as he said: In seventh and eighth places, we’ve got two semiconductor-related names, Teradyne, up 32.8%, and Qnity Electronics, up 31.8%. Teradyne is a semiconductor test […]

headline: Teradyne (TER) Up 7.5% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: Teradyne (TER) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Teradyne’s 5G FR2 Open RAN Push Faces Rich Valuation Question
summary: LitePoint, a Teradyne (NasdaqGS:TER) company, announced a three-way collaboration with Aethertek and Metanoia. The partnership focuses on accelerating development and commercial launch of next generation 5G FR2 Open Radio Units for global Open RAN deployments. A demonstration of the joint solution is planned for Mobile World Congress 2026. For Teradyne, best known for its automated test equipment and industrial automation offerings, this move adds another practical foothold in 5G...

headline: FormFactor, Amkor, Teradyne, and Entegris Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after fears of a global energy price shock hit the semiconductor sector following a sell-off in South Korea's stock market.
